user.title: Chore Tracker Setup
user.description: Choose where to store your tasks.

m365_creds.title: Microsoft 365 — App credentials
m365_creds.description:
Enter your Azure App Registration details.

**Add this Redirect URI in Azure → Authentication:**
`https://homeassistant.peterborough.madasc.com:8123/api/chore_tracker/oauth_callback`

See the README for full step-by-step setup.

m365_oauth.title: Sign in to Microsoft
m365_oauth.description: Click **Open Microsoft login** to sign in with your Microsoft 365 account and grant permission to access your To Do tasks.

m365_list.title: Select To Do List
m365_list.description: Choose which Microsoft To Do list to sync with Chore Tracker.

error.auth_failed: Microsoft login was cancelled or failed. Please try again.
error.no_auth_code: No authorisation code received from Microsoft.
error.token_failed: Failed to exchange code for tokens. Check your Client Secret.

complete_task.name: Complete Task
complete_task.description: Mark a task as permanently completed.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to complete

completed_by.name: Completed By
completed_by.description: Username of who completed the task

temp_complete_task.name: Temporarily Complete Task
temp_complete_task.description: Mark a task as done for a set number of hours, then automatically reset it to pending.

hours.name: Hours
hours.description: Hours until the task resets (1–168, default 24)

complete_by_nfc.name: Complete Task by NFC
complete_by_nfc.description: Complete a task using an NFC tag ID.

nfc_tag_id.name: NFC Tag ID
nfc_tag_id.description: The NFC tag ID that was scanned

completed_by.name: Completed By
completed_by.description: Username of who scanned the tag

add_task.name: Add Task
add_task.description: Create a new chore or task.

priority.name: Priority
priority.description: Task priority: low, medium, high, or urgent

recurrence.name: Recurrence
recurrence.description: Repeat schedule (none, daily, weekly, monthly, etc.)

recurrence_week_position.name: Week Position
recurrence_week_position.description: Week position in month (1–4 or -1 for last)

assigned_to.name: Assigned To
assigned_to.description: List of HA usernames to assign the task to

nfc_tag_id.name: NFC Tag ID
nfc_tag_id.description: NFC tag ID to associate with this task

update_task.name: Update Task
update_task.description: Update fields on an existing task.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to update

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to delete

skip_task.name: Skip Task
skip_task.description: Skip the current occurrence of a recurring task and schedule the next.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the recurring task to skip

snooze_task.name: Snooze Task
snooze_task.description: Delay a task by a number of days.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: The ID of the task to snooze

days.name: Days
days.description: Number of days to snooze (1–365, default 1)

assign_nfc_tag.name: Assign NFC Tag
assign_nfc_tag.description: Associate an NFC tag with a task so tapping the tag completes it.

nfc_tag_id.name: NFC Tag ID
nfc_tag_id.description: The NFC tag ID to assign
